overview.description: The GraniteShares 2x Long AVGO Daily ETF (AVGU) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund provides 2x leveraged exposure, less fees and expenses, to the daily price movement for shares of Broadcom Inc. stock. AVGU was launched on Jul 15, 2025 and is issued by GraniteShares.
